title: Femboys Armoury
description: Kill all the mobs in the nicest of fashion!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4751365ea8cd47d557034045e2ebc9a5e74e7e7.png)
# About
Ever wanted to kill bosses and monsters in style? Well do I know exactly what you need! Introducing Tactical Thigh Highs (TTH for short)! This mod is very new and a lot is needed to be added, also this is my first ever mod so things might be a bit slow as I'm learning.
# Updates
### Major Update
Version 1.2.0
1. Added Fishnets
2. Added rainbow fabric and related items (thigh highs)
3. Added a purple and black variant of thigh highs that has garters
4. added a crafting table and book (both unusable for now)
# To Do
- find more things to put on this to do list (Im struggling)
# Support
If you need anything or have anything to ask, join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/aFc3SAyeRA)!
Also if this mod gets ripped and stolen, or the name I'm using is stolen, I will be very sad, so dont. But seriously though I wont mind if they end up making better mods than me anyway :3.
